note: WDLL 51. Base-zone scalar rows from UDC Table 310-1, ?35-310.01, public official table at https://sanantonio-tx.elaws.us/code/udc_artiii_div2_sec35-310.01 with the City Information Bulletin rendering at https://docsonline.sanantonio.gov/FileUploads/DSD/IB565.pdf (accessed 2026-07-23). side_corner_ft mirrors the base side value only as a non-binding sentinel because Table 310-1 has no separate corner-side column; height and cover fields are likewise non-binding sentinels where the cited table extract does not provide a scalar field. OMITTED: RP; commercial/industrial/special/downtown/overlay codes; zero-lot-line variants; reversed-corner, platted-restriction, alley, adjacency, and height-increase conditions in ??35-373 and 35-515?517. ADDED 2026-07-23: C-1, C-2, C-3, O-2, I-1, and I-2 scalar base-zone rows from Table 310-1. C-3NA and C-3R use the guarded C-3 prefix match. Table 310-1 conditions side/rear setbacks on abutting residential zoning/use and removes the rear requirement for specified alley or same-district conditions; this scalar model retains the tabulated residential-adjacency value and notes the conditional rule.
